{{Quote|I've got ''relatives'' on Bovo Yagen. If I get her planet incinerated, my aunt is going to ''kill'' me.|Antone|<ref name="Showdown at Centerpoint">''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''</ref>}}
'''Antone''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. He had a thin face and a pale complexion.

==Biography==
Antone helped [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]], and [[Anakin Solo]] activate the planetary repulsor on [[Drall (planet)|Drall]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], he was one of the technicians sent by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to try and reactivate [[Centerpoint Station]] prior to the [[Battle of Fondor]]. The irony was that his family lived around [[Bovo Yagen (planet)|Bovo Yagen]] and had nearly been [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Centerpoint during the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]]. Ever since the First Insurrection he had surmised that Centerpoint would only respond to Anakin Solo.
